things.name: Bikini Atoll Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage nuclear test site - extraordinary diving on sunken US and Japanese warships

things.name: Alele Museum & Public Library
things.description: Marshallese history, navigation stick charts and WWII and nuclear test era

things.name: WWII Relics (Eniwetok)
things.description: Remains of WWII battles and nuclear test infrastructure

things.name: Majuro Atoll Lagoon Sailing
things.description: Sail a traditional outrigger canoe on the world's largest atoll lagoon

things.name: Traditional Navigation Stick Charts
things.description: Learn to read the traditional Marshallese wave and island navigation charts

things.name: Laura Beach
things.description: Finest beach on Majuro at the far western end of the atoll

things.name: Marshallese Canoe Building
things.description: Traditional outrigger canoe construction using traditional methods

things.name: Sunrise Market
things.description: Fresh fish, breadfruit, pandanus and local produce at the main market

things.name: Giant Clam Research Farm
things.description: Visit the MIMRA Giant Clam Research Facility restocking reefs

things.name: Pandanus Weaving
things.description: Watch and learn traditional Marshallese pandanus leaf weaving
